rationale.CVE-2024-23342: Transitive advisory via python-jose -> ecdsa with no currently adopted fix path in this repo; tracked for periodic re-evaluation.

review_notes: Allowlist contains only currently observed unresolved advisories. Revisit each dependency upgrade cycle and remove when a validated fix lands.
